backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing file/folder storage with blob management, access control, user approval workflows, profile management, admin functions, and storage statistics tracking.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented features including individual file upload progress, merged view toggle button, tooltips, filename truncation, and their associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend component files describing authentication flows, UI components, file management features, theme support, and query hooks.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing authentication state, access control bootstrap, conditional rendering of profile setup/access denied/file list based on user permissions, and folder navigation state.
frontend/src/components/AccessDenied.tsx: Component displaying pending approval screen with user's Principal ID (shortened and copyable) and instructions to contact an administrator.
Empty file placeholder for admin management component.
frontend/src/components/FileGallery.tsx: Grid view component for files and folders with thumbnails, selection checkboxes, action dropdowns (download, copy link, move, delete), search result path navigation, and tooltips.
frontend/src/components/FileList.tsx: Main file browser component that displays folder contents with support for file/folder operations (upload, download, delete, move, create), search, sorting, multiple view modes (list/grid), drag-and-drop, file preview, and breadcrumb navigation.
frontend/src/components/FileListHeaderRo: Table header component for file list view with sortable columns (name, type, created, size), select-all checkbox, and optional location column for search results.
frontend/src/components/FilePreviewModal: Modal dialog for previewing files with support for images, videos, audio, documents, and text files, including navigation between files, zoom/pan for images, and fullscreen/maximize modes.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Application footer displaying copyright, version number, and attribution link to caffeine.ai with UTM tracking parameters.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Application header with branding, theme toggle, authentication controls (login/logout via Internet Identity), user profile display with copyable principal ID, and admin panel access for administrators.
frontend/src/components/ManagePanel.tsx: Admin panel dialog for managing system members (add/remove users with roles), viewing storage statistics, and displaying system information including version and canister IDs with copy functionality.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Profile setup form for new users to choose a unique username with real-time validation, debounced uniqueness checking, and error handling for duplicate usernames.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: A button component that toggles between light and dark themes using next-themes, displaying sun/moon icons with smooth transitions.
frontend/src/components/ZoomPanViewer.ts: A container component that enables zoom (via mouse wheel) and pan (via click-and-drag) functionality for its children, with automatic reset on content changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAccessBootstrap.ts: Hook that automatically calls initializeAccessControl() once per authenticated session and invalidates access-related React Query caches after bootstrap completes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous actor instance, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality, identity management, and status tracking for the entire app.
Hook that manages per-folder view mode (list or gallery) in memory for the current session, defaulting to 'list'.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for all backend operations including user roles, file management, folder operations, admin functions, and storage stats with proper access control checks.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for UI elements like backgrounds, borders, and semantic tokens.
frontend/src/lib/appVersion.ts: Exports the current application version string (0.4.143).
frontend/src/lib/canisterIds.ts: Utility functions that retrieve backend and frontend canister IDs from multiple sources including environment variables, URL parameters, and window objects.
frontend/src/lib/dragDropDirectory.ts: Provides functions to extract files from drag-and-drop operations, recursively traversing directories using the FileSystem API and falling back to regular file drops when unavailable.
frontend/src/lib/fileLinks.ts: Handles file link operations including generating direct URLs, copying links to clipboard, and downloading files with correct filenames using blob URLs.
frontend/src/lib/fileTypes.ts: Provides utilities for file type detection including extension extraction, MIME type mapping, category checking (image/video/audio/document/code/archive), and human-readable type labels.
frontend/src/lib/fileTypeTints.ts: Maps file categories and folders to Tailwind CSS color tint classes for visual differentiation in both light and dark themes.
frontend/src/lib/folderNavigation.ts: Implements folder navigation logic including breadcrumb path building, path segment resolution, and folder path string generation for UI navigation.
frontend/src/lib/folderUpload.ts: Handles recursive folder uploads by extracting folder structure from FileList, creating folders depth-first, uploading non-empty files, and reporting progress with empty file skipping.
frontend/src/lib/formatFileSize.ts: Formats file sizes from bytes (number or bigint) to human-readable strings using base-1024 units (B, KB, MB, GB, TB).
frontend/src/lib/formatTime.ts: Converts backend Time values (bigint nanoseconds) to formatted date/time strings in various formats (full, date-only, compact timestamp).
frontend/src/lib/id.ts: Generates cryptographically secure 32-byte random IDs as hex strings for file and folder identifiers.
frontend/src/lib/searchNormalize.ts: Normalizes text for Unicode-aware, case-insensitive, diacritics-insensitive search by decomposing characters and removing accents.
frontend/src/lib/sortFileSystemItems.ts: Exports a function to sort file system items by name, size, type, created, or updated date with deterministic tie-breakers (kind, name, id) for stable ordering.
frontend/src/lib/subtreeIndex.ts: Builds a set of folder IDs representing a subtree by creating a parent-to-children index and recursively traversing descendants from a starting folder.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color tokens (using oklch), container settings, border radius variables, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking architectural notes, known issues, and existing features for a cloud storage file manager with upload/download, view toggling, and progress tracking capabilities.
